untranslatable_reason: This is a stop-loss placement and re-entry rule, not a position sizing rule. It describes WHERE to place stops (logic-based on thesis violation) and WHEN to re-enter (3-bar confirmation), but does not specify HOW MUCH capital to risk per trade, what fraction of equity to deploy, or how to scale position size. Position sizing requires explicit specification of risk amount, position multiplier, or equity allocation.
